message:
refactor: concurrent agent improvements across FCP crates

Updates from concurrent agent development work across multiple crates:
- fcp-cli: Test improvements for package reproducibility
- fcp-conformance: Reqcheck module and binary refinements
- fcp-core: Connector state, lifecycle, enrollment posture tests
- fcp-graphql: Client, schema, and subscription enhancements
- fcp-manifest: Library and golden vector test updates
- fcp-mesh: Node improvements
- fcp-sdk: Prelude exports

Includes Cargo.lock update for new dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1836,6 +1836,26 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "fcp-graphql"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "fcp-core",
+ "fcp-streaming",
+ "futures-util",
+ "jsonschema",
+ "pretty_assertions",
+ "rand 0.8.5",
+ "reqwest",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "thiserror 2.0.17",
+ "tokio",
+ "tokio-stream",
+ "tracing",
+ "wiremock",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "fcp-host"
 version = "0.1.0"
